projectDescription: Clinical data management system for sleep apnea programs with patient tracking, medical exams, and follow-up monitoring.
keyFeatures: Patient registration and lifecycle management with 18-month program cycles
Comprehensive clinical exam tracking (polysomnography, monitoring, psychology, nutrition)
Sleep apnea treatment monitoring with CPAP/BiPAP device management
Follow-up system with automatic tracking of patient visits and status changes
Dashboard with analytics, capita month distribution, and patient alerts
Multi-user authentication with role-based access control
Data export capabilities for clinical records and reports
Colombian healthcare system integration (EPS, document types, departments)
publicApiSurface: Patient model with demographics, health metrics, and program enrollment
Ingreso model for managing patient program cycles (ACTIVO/SUSPENDIDO/TERMINADO)
Monitoreo model for tracking CPAP/BiPAP usage and respiratory metrics
PolisomnografiaBasal and PolisomnografiaTitulacion for sleep study data
Psicologia, Nutricion, and Neumologia models for multidisciplinary care
EquipoMedico model for medical device tracking (masks, machines, settings)
Seguimiento and SeguimientoAdaptacion for follow-up notes and adaptation tracking
Dashboard views with patient statistics and capita month distribution
Export functionality via django-import-export for clinical data
